name: Christopher Knight Home Miriam Wood Rectangle Storage Ottoman Bench with Bottom Rack Espresso: Bonded Leather, 250lb Capacity
description: Relaxing in style has never been so easy than with the Christopher Knight Home Miriam Wood Storage Ottoman Bench. Besides being a comfortable foot stool and extra seating space, this ultra-contemporary piece features ample storage room and a bottom rack to hold your necessities. Give your home decor a taste of ultimate sophistication with this gorgeous bonded leather statement ottoman. You will find many uses for this multifunctional Christopher Knight Home Miriam Wood Storage Ottoman Bench.
